case_title: GABRIEL COLVIN WOLF VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLF, GABRIEL COLVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF GABRIEL COLVIN WOLF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY REMY WEILAND. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
